title: Admin ability to upload user photos
excerpt:
HI - It would be nice if the Administrator could be given permission to upload user photos into their profile as it is hard to get people to actually do it - but if I have their photos on file, I could do it myself. 
Ade…

posts.author: AdeleBrown (Adele Brown)
posts.cookedHtml:
HI - It would be nice if the Administrator could be given permission to upload user photos into their profile as it is hard to get people to actually do it - but if I have their photos on file, I could do it myself.
Adele

posts.author: mw01 (MW)
posts.cookedHtml: I believe you can do this as an admin.
